flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gettysburg College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.7k → $39.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gettysburg College rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.2k → $27.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gettysburg College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gettysburg College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.0k → $66.6k).
